title: aquilegia vulgaris subsp. lactiflora
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. lactiflora, also known as the white-cupped columbine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. lactiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
